name: Bodyweight Squat
description: A simple lower-body exercise that builds strength and control through the hips, quads, and glutes.

name: Reverse Lunge
description: Step back into a controlled lunge to improve balance, leg strength, and single-leg stability.

name: Glute Bridge
description: A floor-based movement that targets the glutes and hamstrings while reinforcing core control.

name: Push-Up
description: A classic upper-body movement that strengthens the chest, shoulders, arms, and core.

name: Incline Push-Up
description: A more accessible push-up variation that reduces load while still training pressing form.

name: Dumbbell Row
description: A pulling movement that develops the upper back and helps balance pressing exercises.

name: Superman Hold
description: A simple bodyweight hold that activates the posterior chain and improves body awareness.

name: Plank
description: A foundational core exercise that trains bracing, shoulder stability, and posture.

name: Dead Bug
description: A controlled core movement that teaches trunk stability while the arms and legs move.

name: Mountain Climber
description: A fast-paced conditioning movement that raises the heart rate while challenging the core.

name: Jumping Jack
description: A simple warm-up or cardio option that keeps the whole body moving with little setup.

name: Step-Up
description: A practical lower-body exercise that improves leg strength and balance one side at a time.

name: Shoulder Press
description: A vertical pressing movement that builds shoulder strength and overhead stability.

name: Bicep Curl
description: A focused arm exercise that trains elbow flexion and controlled lifting technique.

name: Tricep Dip
description: A bench-supported movement that challenges the triceps, shoulders, and body control.

name: Hamstring Stretch
description: A light stretch that helps improve flexibility and reduce tightness in the back of the legs.
